room-status-grid.title: 200 Rooms — Online Status
room-status-grid.description: Color cells by active attribute; for MQTT rooms active flips to false via LWT retained offline marker; for CoAP rooms a 45s inactivity rule node clears active.

alarms-panel.title: Active Alarms
alarms-panel.description: Filtered to TEMP_OUT_OF_RANGE from the main rule chain.

floor-averages.title: Floor Averages (60s edge-thinned)
floor-averages.description: avg_temperature / avg_humidity telemetry on the Floor-FNN assets, populated by the MQTT Integration routing campus/b01/fNN/summary.
